evidence: If you enjoy gritty, adult police stories, you gotta watch this show.
Worth watching if you enjoy stories of gritty police work.
The plots are interesting and well written.
The absence of any good guys on this series should not deter you from watching the series.
Sappy but with enough action to make stay with it.
Starts off with you disliking the main character but you kinda learn to like him in a morally incorrect way.
Fairly well written and well acted.
The quality of the video improved vastly as HD became the norm.
Will watch a few more episodes, then decide.
Hope you can produce another season that is as good.
The use of language is nothing short of addictive.
The subjects are interesting and covered in depth.
Be careful what you wish for.
A keeper. Hope you can produce another season that is as good.

summary: The user enjoys gritty police dramas with well-developed characters and interesting plots. They appreciate high production quality and have a mixed response to narrative complexity and pacing, indicating a nuanced taste in storytelling.
